title: Evidence Collector — Framework Control Mapping & Auto-Bundle Generation
description: evidence_collector.py and auto_evidence.py support 7 frameworks with 8 evidence types and auditor-ready bundle packaging. test_auto_evidence.py validates the evidence source enum (8 sources). Gap: auto-collection from live engines is partially wired — scan_result and report evidence types are collected but config and log evidence types are not auto-collected from the running system.
missing: Config evidence auto-collection: scheduled job that exports current engine configuration snapshots as config evidence items mapped to SOC2/ISO27001 controls
Log evidence collection: ship daily log archives from structlog output to the evidence collector as log evidence with SHA-256 integrity hashes
Auditor bundle API: /api/v1/evidence/bundle/export that zips all collected evidence for a framework+date-range into a password-protected auditor package
